name: Sparta Swivel Chair - Blue
description: The curved arms and straight back of the Sparta Swivel Chair adds a touch of glamour to any space. A high-density foam filling and solid wood frame provide exceptional comfort and support, while the swivel feature allows the lounge chair to rotate on its base. Upholstered in a velvet fabric, this swivel chair will make an eye-catching piece in your home. No assembly required.
